briefs.title: Approved Screening Device and Motor Vehicle Rules Updated in BC — Effective February 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC updated two regulations under the Motor Vehicle Act on February 1, 2026: the Approved Screening Device Regulation (rules about roadside breath-testing devices used by police) and the Motor Vehicle Act Regulations (general road and vehicle rules). Both regulations were amended by adding new provisions, though the full text of the added paragraphs is not included in the published notice.
briefs.action_required: Review the full amended regulations to check if your business operations involving vehicles or drivers are affected.
